title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame
- YouTube/Twitch: @tha

title: MadOut 2: Grand Racing games
notes:
- "Car Theft" Event: A new, risky opportunity to earn money has appeared in the city. During the event, find suitable cars, steal them, and deliver them to the drop-off points before you're stopped. The cleaner your job, the higher the reward.
- "Lost Cargo" Event: Planes periodically fly over the city, dropping valuable cargo containers. Get to the drop-off point, open the container, collect the loot, and deliver it to the drop-off point. But be prepared: such cargo can be quite a hunt.
